'''''Pathfinder III''''' was an exploration ship of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

This ship rediscovered the long-lost Human colony of [[Yashuvhu/Legends|Yashuvhu]] on [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. The ''Pathfinder III'' crew was on a first-contact mission, so they introduced themselves to the [[Yashuvhi]]. They tried their best to learn the [[Yashuvhi language]], only to discover that it was a variant of [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with inflections, and that the natives were eager to know whether they, the ''Pathfinder'' crew, were [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

The crew explained to them what Jedi were. A member of the audience, [[The Force/Legends|Force]] adept [[Valara Saar]], convinced them to take her and her [[duuvhal]], [[Zeev]], offworld to learn the Jedi path.
